rest_set.description: A set is a collection of items, such as users or the results of a repository search. Sets may be used for publishing metadata in bulk, moving a group of records, or to run jobs.

id.description: The set id. Should be used in subsequent queries. Output parameter.

type.description: The type of the set (Logical/Itemized). Possible codes are listed in 'SetType' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). Mandatory.

content.description: The type of the content of the set. Possible codes are listed in 'SetContentType' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). Mandatory.

private.description: Indication if the set is private. Possible codes are listed in 'SetPrivacy' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). Default is true.

status.description: Status of the set (Active/Inactive). Possible codes are listed in 'SetStatus' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). Default is 'Active'.

status_date.description: Date of the last status change of the set. Output parameter.

created_by.description: Creator of the set. Output parameter.

created_date.description: Creation date of the set. Output parameter.

query.description: The logical set's related query. Relevant and mandatory for logical sets.

number_of_members.description: A count of the number of members. Output parameter.

members.description: List members of the set. After the set exists, it is possible to add/delete list of members using [Manage members API](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/conf/POST/gwPcGly021p29HpB7XTI4IF+TlIDCf8cxnd2EMydYPE=/37088dc9-c685-4641-bc7f-60b5ca7cabed). The payload for this action is a set structure including the members list in this field. The following id types are expected: - Titles: mms_id - Item: item pid or barcode - User: primary id or other id - PO line: pol number - Collections : collection id - Portfolios: portfolio id - File: file id

additional_info.description: Details about submission of a 'create itemized set' job. Output parameter. This information will be returned when creating a set from MD import population (POST set with population parameter). The link attribute will include link for retrieving information about the submitted job instance.

origin.description: The origin of the members of the set (Institution only/Community Zone). Possible codes are listed in 'SetOrigin' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API). Default is UI.
